summary: W878 routes W735 direct-localization boundary data through direct-right-LCA WPP limit evidence and WPP-op left/Snake colimit evidence. It converts those concrete route inputs into W877 limit and colimit stability fields, then exposes finite-shape transfer, accepted stable boundary, bounded-derived, and ready stable-certificate outputs. This removes opaque WalkingParallelPair stability fields from the immediate boundary path but does not construct a nullary original four-task positive witness.
obligations_discharged: W877 WalkingParallelPair limit stability is now derived from direct-right-LCA right-open and right-surjectivity inputs.
W877 WalkingParallelPair colimit stability is now derived from WPP-op left closed-embedding input plus the AddCommGrp SnakeInput cokernel-row input.
W735 closed-map and closed-embedding branch records can now enter the W877 direct-localization boundary without caller-supplied opaque WPP stability fields.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: Separate opaque WalkingParallelPair limit-stability field for the direct-localization boundary.
Separate opaque WalkingParallelPair colimit-stability field for the direct-localization boundary.
Mapping-cone WPP limit comparison as an external route input for this boundary path.
W778 closed-range comparison, exact-closure, and endpoint-topology fields for this direct-localization boundary path.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
OriginalFourTaskProductData still requires caller-supplied bounded-derived stable data, W852 route data, or W961 closed-embedding closedness field data; no nullary product witness exists.
The W878 bridge still consumes caller-supplied W735 branch data and four concrete WPP route inputs; it does not construct those values from nothing.
A concrete nullary W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch record is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WPP limit right open-map pure LCA certificate is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WPP limit right-surjectivity pure LCA certificate is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WPP-op colimit left closed-embedding certificate is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WPP-op AddCommGrp SnakeInput cokernel-row certificate is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
remaining_work: Construct concrete nullary W735 branch data or a stronger route that eliminates that branch input.
Construct the two direct-right-LCA WPP limit inputs and the two WPP-op left/Snake colimit inputs, or replace them with a stronger nullary stability theorem.
Use concrete source data plus direct-left-calculus and source-triangulation evidence to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
